languages.text: Безжалостные и жаждущие искупления в смерти меровцы, получившие прозвище "Зарковские кающиеся", стали одной из главных ударных сил протектората фон Валанциус в извечной борьбе с врагами Человечества.

Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.
languages.original_text: Безжалостные и жаждущие искупления в смерти меровцы, получившие прозвище "Зарковские кающиеся", стали одной из главных ударных сил протектората фон Валанциус в извечной борьбе с врагами Человечества.

traits.locale_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

languages.text: 冷酷で死後の贖罪を望むメロヴィアンは「ザルコフの悔い改め者」と呼ばれ、人類の敵との永遠の戦いでフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領の主要な攻撃部隊となった。
languages.original_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: 冷酷で死後の贖罪を望むメロヴィアンは「ザルコフの悔い改め者」と呼ばれ、人類の敵との永遠の戦いでフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領の主要な攻撃部隊となった。

languages.text: 梅罗夫人冷酷无情，渴望在死亡中寻求救赎。他们被冠以“扎尔科夫悔罪者”之名，成为了冯·瓦兰修斯属地中，对抗人类之敌的主要打击力量之一。
languages.original_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: 梅罗夫人冷酷无情，渴望在死亡中寻求救赎。他们被冠以“扎尔科夫悔罪者”之名，成为了冯·瓦兰修斯属地中，对抗人类之敌的主要打击力量之一。

languages.text: Surnommés les « Pénitents de Zarkov », les impitoyables Meroviens cherchaient la rédemption dans la mort et devinrent l'une des principales forces d'intervention du protectorat von Valancius dans la lutte éternelle contre les ennemis de l'humanité.
languages.original_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Surnommés les « Pénitents de Zarkov », les impitoyables Meroviens cherchaient la rédemption dans la mort et devinrent l'une des principales forces d'intervention du protectorat von Valancius dans la lutte éternelle contre les ennemis de l'humanité.

languages.text: Despiadados y ansiosos por encontrar la redención en la muerte, los merovianos, también conocidos como «penitentes de Zarkov», se convirtieron en una de las fuerzas de asalto principales del protectorado von Valancius en su lucha eterna contra los enemigos de la Humanidad.
languages.original_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Despiadados y ansiosos por encontrar la redención en la muerte, los merovianos, también conocidos como «penitentes de Zarkov», se convirtieron en una de las fuerzas de asalto principales del protectorado von Valancius en su lucha eterna contra los enemigos de la Humanidad.

languages.text: Acımasız ve ölümde kefaret arzulayan, "Zarkov Tövbekârları" olarak adlandırılan Merovlular, İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı bitmek bilmeyen mücadelede von Valancius protektorasındaki ana silahlardan biri hâline geldi.
languages.original_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Acımasız ve ölümde kefaret arzulayan, "Zarkov Tövbekârları" olarak adlandırılan Merovlular, İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı bitmek bilmeyen mücadelede von Valancius protektorasındaki ana silahlardan biri hâline geldi.

languages.text: Skrupellos und begierig auf Erlösung im Tod wurden die als 'Büßer von Zarkov' bezeichneten Merovianer zu einer der wichtigsten Streitkräfte im ewigen Ringen der Dynastie derer von Valancius mit den Feinden der Menschheit.
languages.original_text: Ruthless and hungry for redemption in death, the Merovians, dubbed the "Zarkov Penitents," became one of the main strike forces in the von Valancius protectorate in the eternal struggle against the enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Skrupellos und begierig auf Erlösung im Tod wurden die als 'Büßer von Zarkov' bezeichneten Merovianer zu einer der wichtigsten Streitkräfte im ewigen Ringen der Dynastie derer von Valancius mit den Feinden der Menschheit.
